methodology: FRC Research — HMDA 2018-2024 + public guideline analysis

fha.min_fico_note: Agency minimum — PennyMac follows FHA floor per overlay matrix
fha.condo_note: FHA Single Unit Condo approval ineligible per overlay matrix
fha.frozen_credit_note: All bureaus must be unfrozen — AUS rerun required
fha.disputed_derogatory_note: Borrowers with $1000+ in disputed derogatory accounts require manual UW
fha.installment_debt_note: May not pay down to < 10 months to exclude from DTI
key_restrictions: FHA Single Unit Condo approval ineligible
DELRAP approval ineligible
Manufactured homes minimum FICO 620 for purchase/rate-and-term, 640 for cash-out
Manufactured homes minimum FICO 640 for manually underwritten 203b
Business income decline greater than 20% makes borrower ineligible
Non-traditional credit not allowed
Joint loans not allowed
Multiple cash-out transactions within prior 12 months on same property not allowed
No simple refinances eligible
Energy Efficient Mortgages, Weatherization, Solar & Wind, and GPM ineligible
High-Cost Loans not purchased
Cooperatives, mobile homes, single-width manufactured homes, geodesic domes/berm homes ineligible
Working farms or ranches ineligible
All ARM terms not specifically listed ineligible
ARMs for manufactured homes ineligible
Maximum base loan amount $2,500,000
Manufactured homes: fee simple land ownership only, no leaseholds or land trusts
Manufactured homes: principal residence only
Manufactured homes: one-unit only
Manufactured homes: property condition C4 or better
Manufactured homes: cannot be moved or will move to another location
Manufactured homes: escrow holdbacks ineligible
For loans >$1.5M: primary mortgage/housing history 0x30x12 most recent 12 months required
Subject mortgage history 0x30 for last 3 payments required
Frozen credit bureaus must be unfrozen
Appraisal required if HVE/Clear Capital AVM does not return value or FSD >15%
External appraisal or full appraisal required for manufactured homes regardless of loan amount
For loan amounts >$2M: maximum 80% LTV/CLTV
Disaster inspections cannot be completed by lender

va.cash_out_note: Min 700 FICO for cash-out Type II transactions

ofi_component.note: Based on 2024 HMDA denial rate 26.6% FHA (national 22.4%)

fha.min_fico_note: UWM known for low overlays — near agency minimum

ofi_component.note: 2024 HMDA denial rate 19.9% FHA — lowest in dataset. Wholesale model pre-screens.

fha.min_fico_note: Rocket historically serves FHA — 66,721 FHA originated 2024

ofi_component.note: 2024 HMDA denial rate 28.4% FHA — moderate overlay

fha.min_fico_note: Inferred from HMDA — only 848 FHA originated 2024, 58.5% denial rate
fha.strategic_note: Wells Fargo has systematically exited FHA market — 63% volume decline 2018-2024

ofi_component.note: 2024 HMDA: FHA 58.5%, Conv 30.9% — highest friction in dataset

fha.strategic_note: JPMorgan FHA presence minimal — primarily conventional focus

ofi_component.note: 2024 HMDA: FHA 44.3%, Conv 12.1% — conv efficient, FHA restricted

fha.strategic_note: BofA FHA near-exit: only 412 originated 2024, 63 VA originated

ofi_component.note: 2024 HMDA: FHA 45.6%, Conv 42.0% — highest conventional friction

fha.note: Permanent tightening post-2022 shock — DTI conservatism increased

ofi_component.note: 2024 HMDA: FHA 37.0% — elevated above national, structural shift post-2022

ml_config.note: ML activates when 100 verified denial cases collected via Denial Decoder

feedback_config.note: 3 broker flag = rule auto-reviewed. 5 flags = rule updated.
